title: agnus-castus incisa
intro: Agnus-castus incisa, also known as Chaste Tree or Vitex agnus-castus, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and hormonal balancing effects. The health benefits of Agnus-castus incisa include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as support for fertility and hormone regulation. Herbal preparations of Agnus-castus incisa include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
